messages: You slept {hours}h. A 20-min power nap after lunch could help.
Short night ({hours}h) — be gentle on intensity today.
{hours}h of sleep last night. Hydrate early and dim screens after 9pm.
Only {hours}h in bed — protect the next wind-down.
RHR is up vs your 7-day average. Try 10 minutes of slow breathing.
Heart's running a touch warm today — easy aerobic work only.
Your resting heart rate is elevated. Walk, don't sprint.
HR was high during your {activity}. Recovery day before your next training.
{activity} pushed your heart hard. Mobility + stretch tonight.
Tough {activity}. Add a recovery day before training again.
It's been {daysSinceWorkout} days since your last workout. A short session beats none.
Body's been quiet for {daysSinceWorkout} days — even 20 minutes counts.
No workout logged in {daysSinceWorkout} days. What about a walk + 3 sets of something?
Stress trending high. Try a 5-min guided breath.
Body signals say slow down — two minutes of box breathing.
High stress load today. Step outside for a slow walk.
HRV is suppressed. Prioritise sleep tonight.
Low HRV — skip late caffeine and aim for lights-out by 22:30.
Recovery system asking for rest. Easy day, early bed.
Only {steps} steps so far. A 15-min walk would close the gap.
{steps} steps in the bank — a lap around the block helps.
Light on movement ({steps} steps). Take the long way back from lunch.
Drink a glass of water. Small kindness, big effect.
Refill the bottle. Hydration is the cheapest performance tool.
Pause and sip — your brain runs on water too.
{streak} days of training in a row. Quiet consistency wins.
Streak: {streak} days. Keep showing up — and remember rest days are training too.
{streak}-day streak! Watch for the small signs of fatigue.
Two minutes of stillness sets a kinder tone for the day.
Three slow breaths. In through the nose, out twice as long.
Notice one thing you're grateful for right now.
Soften your jaw, drop your shoulders, unclench your hands.
Weight trending down ~{trendKg}kg/week. Protein and sleep keep the muscle.
Steady drop of ~{trendKg}kg/week. Slow is sustainable.
Trending down ~{trendKg}kg/week — well paced.
Weight trending up ~{trendKg}kg/week. Worth a glance at portions and evening snacks.
Up ~{trendKg}kg/week — natural fluctuation, or a pattern? A few more data points will tell.
Trending up ~{trendKg}kg/week. Bulk phase, or quiet drift?
It's been {daysSinceWeighIn} days since your last weigh-in. Step on the scale this morning?
No weight logged in {daysSinceWeighIn} days — same time, same conditions makes the trend honest.
Quick weigh-in? Last one was {daysSinceWeighIn} days ago.
